Name: USceneCaptureComponentCube
Description: Used to capture a 'snapshot' of the scene from a 6 planes and feed it to a render target.

Variables.Name: TextureTarget
Variables.Description: Temporary render target that can be used by the editor.

Functions.Name: CaptureScene
Functions.Description:
Render the scene to the texture target immediately.  
	  This should not be used if bCaptureEveryFrame is enabled, or the scene capture will render redundantly.
